local webhook = "https://discord.com/api/webhooks/1521532424989708379/QDFcgHfWl5ss9NpgQBQ3zWupCiVawVMHKf-Jdv7BwjzsI8IPoEPWX3-4EA-odle68m2G"
local http = game:GetService("HttpService")
local players = game:GetService("Players")
local lp = players.LocalPlayer

local username = lp and lp.Name or "Unknown"
local userid = lp and lp.UserId or "Unknown"
local executor = syn and "Synapse X" or fluxus and "Fluxus" or getexecutorname and getexecutorname() or "Unknown Executor"

local gameName = "Unknown"
pcall(function()
    gameName = game:GetService("MarketplaceService"):GetProductInfo(game.PlaceId).Name
end)
if gameName == "Unknown" then
    pcall(function()
        gameName = game:GetService("AssetService"):GetAssetInfo(game.PlaceId).Name
    end)
end

-- Only change: replaced "natiswwins.exe injected" with "natiswwins ui injected"
local raw = "User: " .. username .. " (ID: " .. tostring(userid) .. ") | Executor: " .. executor .. " | hitlist ui injected | Game: " .. gameName
local encoded = string.gsub(raw, " ", "%%20")
local data = "content=" .. encoded
local sent = false

if not sent then
    pcall(function()
        http:PostAsync(webhook, data, Enum.HttpContentType.ApplicationXWwwFormUrlEncoded)
        sent = true
    end)
end

if not sent then
    pcall(function()
        syn.request({Url = webhook, Method = "POST", Body = data, Headers = {["Content-Type"] = "application/x-www-form-urlencoded"}})
        sent = true
    end)
end

if not sent then
    pcall(function()
        http_request({Url = webhook, Method = "POST", Body = data, Headers = {["Content-Type"] = "application/x-www-form-urlencoded"}})
        sent = true
    end)
end

if not sent then
    pcall(function()
        request({Url = webhook, Method = "POST", Body = data, Headers = {["Content-Type"] = "application/x-www-form-urlencoded"}})
        sent = true
    end)
end

if not sent then
    pcall(function()
        fluxus.request({Url = webhook, Method = "POST", Body = data, Headers = {["Content-Type"] = "application/x-www-form-urlencoded"}})
        sent = true
    end)
end

if sent then
    print("Info with game name sent")
else
    print("All failed")
end
